text: "Hello?" "Hello." "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Nevada State Relief Program." "So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet?" "Yeah, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan."
